subject: Enthusiasm for Your Work in Flexible Sensors and AI-Driven Diagnostics
body_preview:
Dear Professor Doe,

I hope this message finds you well. My name is Rana Talha Khalid, and I am a final-year Biomedical Engineering student at NED University of Engineering & Technology in Pakistan, maintaining a CGPA of 3.8/4.0. I have been following your lab’s contributions with genuine admiration
